claims.name: Existence of a common reasoning structure
claims.falsification_condition: incompatible in-scope reasoning systems for which no common structure preserves the registered commitments

claims.name: FAR bounded representational sufficiency
claims.maximum_supported_scope: specific frozen systems and mappings already tested
claims.required_next_test: prospective observation-contract pilot with negative controls
claims.falsification_condition: an in-scope frozen source contract cannot be preserved without protected-theory change

claims.name: FAR universality
claims.required_next_test: independent adversarial holdout and boundary accumulation
nonclaims: absence of discovered counterexamples proves universality

claims.name: Necessity of FAR primitives
claims.required_next_test: registered primitive ablations with hidden-reintroduction audits
claims.falsification_condition: a valid preserved reconstruction omits a tested primitive without prohibited reintroduction

claims.name: FAR minimality
claims.required_next_test: broad alternative-vocabulary search with full-cost Pareto comparison
claims.falsification_condition: a simpler candidate preserves the same contract and Pareto-dominates FAR

claims.name: FAR imposes nontrivial representational constraints
claims.falsification_condition: invalid output-equivalent encodings pass the same acceptance machinery

claims.name: FAR comparative economy
claims.required_next_test: canonical full-cost model across strong competitor mappings
claims.falsification_condition: FAR is dominated or its apparent advantage depends on uncounted machinery

claims.name: Independent replication
claims.maximum_supported_scope: internal isolated implementation robustness where completed
claims.required_next_test: R3 independent technical replication followed by R4 adversarial conceptual replication
claims.falsification_condition: qualified independent teams cannot reproduce the frozen result or identify framing-dependent acceptance
